targetCourse.pilotLocation: Controlled FYEC100 Moodle pilot course shell

defaultPreview.coursePage: FYEC100 orientation and academic support page

scenarios.title: Student iframe launch
scenarios.coursePage: FYEC100 orientation and academic support page
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Assistant uses student-facing learning support tone, explains FYEC100 expectations, and keeps academic integrity reminders visible.

scenarios.title: Lecturer review launch
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Assistant supports pilot testing, course content review, and escalation planning without claiming access to private student records.

scenarios.title: LMS administrator block launch
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Assistant supports LMS placement checks, fallback link testing, and Moodle navigation guidance.

scenarios.title: Future LTI launch rehearsal
scenarios.expectedBehavior: Assistant treats the launch as a future trust-boundary rehearsal and reminds admins that Phase 2 does not validate LTI identity yet.

requiredChecks.label: Course context
requiredChecks.evidence: Simulated launch URLs include courseId and courseShortName.

requiredChecks.label: Role context
requiredChecks.evidence: Simulated launch URLs include role values for student, lecturer, or LMS administrator testing.

requiredChecks.label: Launch source context
requiredChecks.evidence: Simulated launch URLs include iframe, Moodle block, direct, or future LTI launch source values.

requiredChecks.label: Fallback link
requiredChecks.evidence: The simulator provides a fallback link for use when iframe embedding is blocked.

requiredChecks.label: Moodle origin
requiredChecks.evidence: MOODLE_ORIGIN must be configured before hosted iframe testing.

notes: This simulator is a Phase 2 pilot aid. It does not authenticate Moodle users.
Use the generated preview links to test the embedded assistant behavior before placing it inside a live Moodle course.
Production role and course trust should come from Moodle-side validation or LTI 1.3 launch validation.
